sections.instruction: Complete the table below. Write ONE WORD OR A NUMBER.

Choose the correct letter A, B or C.

questions.content: Simon’s idea for a theme park came from
options: B his interest in landscape design
C his visit to another park

questions.content: When they started, the family decided to open the park only when
options: A the weather was expected to be good
B the children weren’t at school
C there were fewer farming commitments

questions.content: Since opening, the park has had

sections.instruction: What is currently the main area of work of each of the following people? Choose FIVE answers from the box and write the correct letter A-H next to questions 14-18.
Complete the table below. Write ONE WORD OR A NUMBER.
Complete the notes below. Write NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS OR A NUMBER.
Choose the correct letter A, B or C.

questions.content: The owners of the underground house
options: A had no experience of living in a rural area
B were interested in environmental issues
C wanted a professional project manager

questions.content: What does the speaker say about the site of the house?
options: A The land was quite cheap
B Stone was being extracted nearby
C It was in a completely unspoilt area

sections.instruction: Complete the notes below. Write ONE WORD OR A NUMBER.

questions.content:
Design
• Built in the earth, with two floors
• The south-facing side was constructed of two layers of (33){{BLANK}}
• Photovoltaic tiles were attached
• A layer of foam was used to improve the (34){{BLANK}} of the building
Special features
• To increase the light, the building has many internal mirrors and (35){{BLANK}}
• In future, the house may produce more (36){{BLANK}} than it needs
• Recycled wood was used for the (37){{BLANK}} of the house
• The system for processing domestic (38){{BLANK}} is organic
Environmental issues
• The use of large quantities of (39){{BLANK}} in construction was environmentally harmful
• But the house will have paid its ‘environmental debt’ within (40){{BLANK}}
